description: Experteer is a career and recruiting platform focused on professional and executive jobs, connecting candidates, headhunters, and employers. Its recruiter offering includes job advertising and candidate-search tools across multiple country sites.
summary: Experteer exposes a recruiter-facing HTTP integration for job posting/job feed submission, authenticated with an Experteer-issued API key obtained through the recruiter account/contact process; no public OpenAPI, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.

surfaces.name: Experteer Recruiting job posting / job feed API
